emails.subject: Hoop it up
emails.body: Hoop it up I need a number where you can be reached on Friday evening. I will be getting the schedule after work on Friday and will call and let you know when and where our games will be. D

emails.subject: Re: Hoop it up
emails.body: Re: Hoop it up Try 713-839-0573 (home), but more likely: 713-557-4869 (cell), and just to be clear O'neal and I are the "assault" part of the team, not the "Aggie" part.
